# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deploy
on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]
jobs:
  build-deploy:
    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, x64]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - name: Execute custom build script
        run: |
          ./build.sh
          
      - name: Execute deployment commands
        run: |
          ./deploy.sh
          
      - name: Run additional custom commands
        run: |
          ./custom-deploy.sh
          
      - name: Cleanup
        if: always()
        run: |
          ./cleanup.sh
